rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARTIN MANUEL MACEDO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/23/2026 for the following issues to be cleared before 3/13/2026. The fiduciary must e-file a verified supplement and submit a revised proposed order to clear these issues: (1) The caption of the order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. LRSF 14.35.I.6).b. (2) Need to clarify the statutory compensation. $17,121.43 seems correct. Please review the 3% calculation. (3) Need to clarify the reimbursement request. The total on Page 7 should be $1,870.98, not $1,884.09. (4) The petition must set forth the dollar amount of cash (as of a date certain) to be distributed to each distributee. CRC 7.651 and LRSF 14.35.I.6).a. Percentage only insufficient.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL ALEXIS SHILAFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the report did not include all the disclosures required by LRSF 14.35 J. Any future report of status (petition requesting additional time to administer the estate) must include all such disclosures. Status of filing a petition for final distribution or a further report of status with a petition requesting additional time to administer the estate will be set for 6/1/26. No appearance will be required on that date if a petition is filed at least two weeks before that date. NB: Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).]

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) No Inventory and Appraisal has been filed (2) The personal representative should have filed either a petition for an order for final distribution or a petition for approval of the report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code sec. 12200 et seq. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLEVELAND GALLAT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/22/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) A proposed personal representative is required to sign and verify her own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment to a petition. [CRC 7.103(c).] (2) Letters issued to the personal representative of Wayne Ashley Chase's estate have not been filed. A copy of his will is insufficient. Notice must be given to, or waived by, this personal representative. (3) Gary Reeder and Terrance Lawler have not waived bond. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/8/26. Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LILLER B. JACKSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/08/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) The original will does not appear to have been lodged with the court (Probate Code Section 8200). 2) Petition is incomplete. Item 4 is blank but appears to apply. 3) Item 8 must include the name and relationship to decedent for all persons listed, in addition to a mailing address. The name of a city is insufficient. 4) All heirs must be listed even if a decedent died testate. If there are additional heirs not listed in item 8, they will need to be given notice of the petition (San Francisco Local Rule 14.18.C). 5) No Duties and Liabilities has been filed (Probate Code Section 8404). 6) No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Form DE-147S) has been filed (San Francisco Local Rule 14.18.E). 7) No Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (Form DE-121) has been filed (Probate Code Section 8100). All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1C.6). 8) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 04/01/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAURENCE HOWARD LIEF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required merely for Letters of Special Administration to be extended, if needed. This petition is not ready to be heard. 1) The will does not appear to have been filed. 2) Item 2d of the petition is incomplete (amount of bond), and item 3e of the petition is incomplete. 3) A copy of the will is not attached as Attachment 3f(2) to the petition. 4) Without a copy of the will, it is unknown who the beneficiaries or named executors are. 5) The surviving spouse has priority for appointment. Item 3g(1)(d) of the petition indicates that her declination will be filed separately, but neither her declination nor the petitioner's sister's declination or nomination has been filed. 6) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) has not been filed. Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
